title: Cobblemon: Breedable Galarian Fossils
description: A datapack that makes the Galarian Fossils breedable via the Cobbreeding addon.
body:
This datapack allows the Galarian Fossils to be bred with Ditto, as well as any Pokemon in the [Mineral](https://bulbapedia.bulbagarden.net/wiki/Mineral_(Egg_Group)) egg group.

It requires the [Cobbreeding](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbreeding) addon (or another addon that reads the pokemon's Species data when deciding whether or not a Pokemon can breed) to do anything.

I may eventually add more Pokemon to the pack on request :)

Created for and used by [Virtuositas](https://www.youtube.com/@virtcreates) on his [Cobblemon x Create](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblemon-x-creating) series. You can find the playlist [here](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6zLIojO6-BsoQZAi98abPIKMkIKK1V6E)!
